title: Utada HikaruBeautiful World
wikitext:
[]: Utada HikaruãBeautiful Worldã             Quote Post by vito » Tue Dec 02, 2014 1:19 pm Utada Hikaru「Beautiful World」 Directed by Tsurumaki Kazuya https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uuMNmHdr0Lg since it's rebuild footage

[]:             Quote Post by Rosenakahara » Tue Dec 02, 2014 1:22 pm Hey a version on youtube that doesn't sound like shit! thanks for the link. Also the Shinji x Rei and asumari is strong in this video

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Dec 02, 2014 2:43 pm This is pretty cool, since Tsurumaki is very good in timing pictures to music to tell a story (FLCL f.i.). I'm just wondering, where is this from and when has this been released originally?

[]:             Quote Post by vito » Tue Dec 02, 2014 3:57 pm *sigh* It was posted probably 30 minutes before I slapped it on here. Where? Well the link is to the video on Hikaru Utada's official & verified youtube channel. What is it? Part of the promotion for the new album of hers. http://www.utadahikaru.jp/15th/creator_detail01.html

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Dec 02, 2014 4:01 pm It's really weird to have a video mostly of image image of a bustling Tokyo-3 accompanying a song which talk about a beautiful world when you know the state in which said city is reduced to in Q...

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Dec 02, 2014 4:09 pm Because it's a silly promotion like the 7-11 stuff. Canon don't matter.

[]:             Quote Post by WunderBah » Tue Dec 02, 2014 5:18 pm Rosenakahara wrote: Hey a version on youtube that doesn't sound like shit!

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Dec 02, 2014 6:05 pm vito wrote: *sigh* It was posted probably 30 minutes before I slapped it on here. Where? Well the link is to the video on Hikaru Utada's official & verified youtube channel. What is it? Part of the promotion for the new album of hers. http://www.utadahikaru.jp/15th/creator_detail01.html

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 02, 2014 6:36 pm Copy/paste-crosspost from Not Actual News thread: Sailor Star Dust wrote: New cut PV (footage of all 3 films) of Utada's Beautiful World directed by Tsurumaki: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-3459.html

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Dec 02, 2014 7:16 pm Interesting. That's all I can say. Though it does make me wonder what else those magicians are doing behind the scenes. With news updates actually happening on the official website now & Khara free to do what they want with the property - can't wait for that BD - I think we're getting pretty close to the floodgates opening up & letting real news & info regarding the final film to start pouring out.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Dec 02, 2014 7:20 pm ^ I don't think anything will happen before the release of the HD-version of the original series. Maybe an announcement in form of a flyer in the box set, or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue Dec 02, 2014 8:46 pm I wouldn't be surprised if they decided to ring in the new year on January 1st the same way they did in 2012. Put out a little pic & memo with the film's full title.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Dec 02, 2014 9:01 pm ^ Could be, but at that point, we already had a teaser and knew Q would come in 2012. As things stand, I really don't expect Shin to be released in 2015; so such an announcement would seem more logical for New Year's 2016 to me.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Dec 02, 2014 9:11 pm Not a single NTE film has been produced and marketed similarly. To expect the same timelines for each production is, well, it’s not gonna happen the same way twice. Every production has been unique so far, with Ha being produced and marketed differently than Jo was, and Q being produced and marketed differently from Ha. I don’t think Shin will be produced and marketed in a way we’ll be able to predict very well.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Dec 03, 2014 7:04 am ^ Well, then there's no reason at all to assume the reveal of the English title for New Year's. :)

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Dec 03, 2014 9:46 am Not a strong one, anyway, to assume that the English title "Evangelion 3.0+1.0: (No)" will be announced in the new year. :)

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Dec 03, 2014 3:47 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: I wouldn't be surprised if they decided to ring in the new year on January 1st the same way they did in 2012. Put out a little pic & memo with the film's full title.

[]:             Quote Post by skulkidcachi90 » Wed Dec 03, 2014 4:09 pm Rosenakahara wrote: Hey a version on youtube that doesn't sound like shit! thanks for the link. Also the Shinji x Rei and asumari is strong in this video

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Dec 03, 2014 4:14 pm skulkidcachi90 wrote: Why they still teasing that, I not have problem with that idea because sound very interesting but they not show us nothing to make that idea credible.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Dec 03, 2014 5:43 pm I'm still searching the MariAsu here, we only have one passage with Asuka followed by Mari, and Mari appears mixed will segments of all the other characters.
